content:
EXECUTION MODE — BUILD THE COMPLETE IVX HOLDINGS APP

Proceed with BUILD.

Requirements:

1. Build ONE unified IVX Holdings Expo application.
2. Include every existing module:
   - Home
   - Feed
   - Properties
   - Deals
   - Reels
   - Chat
   - Members
   - Investors
   - Buyers
   - Media
   - Notifications
   - Owner AI
   - AI Engineering Command Center
   - Vercel Exit Command Center (Owner only)
   - Revenue
   - Analytics
   - Settings
   - Variables
   - Deployments
3. Do not create a dashboard-only APK.
4. Build through Expo EAS using the existing project.
5. Increment the versionCode.
6. Commit to GitHub.
7. Deploy to Render.
8. Verify:
   - GitHub SHA
   - Render SHA
   - /version SHA
   - APK embedded SHA
   All must match.
9. Generate:
   - Production APK
   - Production AAB
10. Upload the APK as a downloadable artifact and return a direct HTTPS download link.
11. Execute the complete QA suite and report any real failures only.
12. Return final production evidence:
    - APK filename
    - APK SHA-256
    - Version
    - Build number
    - Commit SHA
    - Deployment ID
    - Production URL
    - Health check
    - Route count
    - Final PASS/FAIL summary.

Do not stop after planning. Execute until the production build is complete.
